data.body:
![Power System Protection and Coordination Study: 5 Myths That Could Compromise Your Electrical Safety in Malaysia](https://carelabz.com/my/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/relay-coordination-study-1.webp)

[Blogs](https://carelabz.com/my/category/blog-post/) 
•

admin 
•

February 18, 2025

Businesses cannot afford to take shortcuts with respect to electrical safety. And, one crucial step that ensures the safety and stability of your electrical infrastructure is power system protection and coordination study. However, there are numerous myths concerning relay coordination studies that lead to expensive and risky mistakes. Through this blog post, we will learn about 5 such common myths to clear up any confusion. And, let’s look into how Care Labs is your best choice to ensure the electrical safety of your business in Malaysia.

**Relay Coordination Studies and Their Importance**

Relay coordination is the process of coordinating the settings of protection relays to make the trip in the proper order when an electric fault occurs. This research avoids unnecessary power cuts and equipment losses, such that only the parts of the system that are faulty are cut off while the rest of the network continues to operate. Misconceptions about it can lead to ineffective protection and higher risks.

**Top 5 myths about relay coordination study**

### **Myth 1: Only Large Industries Need Power System Protection**

This is the most common misconception that power system protection and coordination studies are only for large-scale industries. But, the truth is, any facility, irrespective the size, can reap benefits from such studies. Basically, protection coordination studies help companies identify potential faults and protect them from mishaps. Fortunately. Care Labs specializes in customizing the study as per the industry’s requirements to ensure optimized protection.

**Myth 2: Relay Coordination Settings are standardized**

The second most widely held belief is that relay settings are uniform for any system; however, this is incorrect. Relay coordination settings need to be adjusted to the specific characteristics of each system. This study focuses on ensuring settings are optimized; which will minimize equipment failure or downtime risk. Care Labs employs software such as ETAP to accurately calculate and personalize relay settings, improving safety as well as performance.

### **Myth 3: Electrical Coordination Studies are Conducted after the Issue arises.**

Relying on electrical coordination studies only after a fault occurs is a dangerous practice. A preventive strategy towards protective relay coordination studies ensures that systems are ready for possible faults. This strategy minimizes the likelihood of accidents and equipment failure. Care Labs promotes periodic reviews to ensure your system is always compliant and functioning optimally.

### **Myth 4: Only New Systems Need Relay Coordination Studies**

Though new installations certainly benefit from relay coordination studies, existing systems need regular evaluation. This is because, factors such as modifications in system layout, equipment replacements, or changes in load requirements can all affect relay coordination. Hence, Protective device coordination studies must be conducted to recheck and ensure everything is operating appropriately. Care Labs provides ongoing support to periodically review and modify your system’s coordination.

**Myth 5: Protection Devices Once Installed Do Not Require Adjustment**

A few believe that once protective device coordination is done, no changes are ever necessary. Power systems are dynamic, and after a while, updating settings may be necessary. For instance, new equipment or power distribution changes may call for new power coordination studies to maintain safety. Care Labs conducts periodic follow-up testing to ensure protection settings are still optimal.

**Why Choose Care Labs for Your Power System Protection**

Care Labs Malaysia is an expert in overall power system protection and coordination studies. Their professional team conducts thorough relay coordination studies and analysis with the latest software such as ETAP. Whether you have new equipment or wish to evaluate an existing system, Care Labs offers customized solutions to provide top-notch protection for your business.

![](https://carelabz.com/my/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/relay-coordination-study-2-683x1024.webp)

**Now is the time to secure your systems**

Electrical safety cannot wait. Don’t let a fault interfere with your business operations. Get in touch with Care Labs Malaysia today and book your power system protection and coordination study to ensure your system is optimized for performance and safety.
